slides.title: The Workflow
slides.body: Use ChatGPT for client outreach scripts, Midjourney for branding, and ElevenLabs for voice overs. But the real secret is the engine that ties them together: an AI CRM that never sleeps.
slides.highlight: Convert leads automatically while you focus on delivery.
slides.image_prompt: soft deep navy abstract laptop aesthetic, minimal design

slides.title: Your 3-Step Setup
stats: STEP 1 — ChatGPT: Auto-generate highly personalized outreach and proposals.
STEP 2 — Midjourney & ElevenLabs: Craft stunning, conversion-focused creative assets.
STEP 3 — AI CRM: Let automated pipelines follow up and close the deals 24/7.
slides.image_prompt: minimal tech diagram deep navy tones, data visualization

slides.title: Why This Scales
slides.body: Freelancers struggle with inconsistency because they stop prospecting when they get busy. By automating lead intake and nurturing with an AI CRM, your pipeline never goes cold.
slides.future: Consistency transforms a side hustle into a sustainable agency.
slides.image_prompt: growing bar chart abstract deep navy colors

slides.question: Is your business pipeline automated yet?
slides.tagline: Build a business that runs itself.

caption:
💸 3 AI tools to make $100/day! Leverage these tools to jumpstart your earnings:

1️⃣ ChatGPT: Auto-generate outreach and client proposals.
2️⃣ Midjourney & ElevenLabs: Craft premium visual and audio assets.
3️⃣ AI CRM: Capture, nurture, and close leads 24/7 on autopilot.

Consistency is key. While you focus on creating with AI tools, let an automated CRM handle the follow-ups.

Follow @ai_signal_09 for daily hustles 📈
